children.heading: Alien
children.label: 1 Alien
children.text: The term “alien” has the meaning given that term in .section 1101(a) of title 8

children.label: A
children.text: the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs, the Committee on Foreign Relations, the Select Committee on Intelligence, the Committee on Appropriations, and the majority leader and minority leader of the Senate; and

children.label: B
children.text: the Committee on Financial Services the Committee on Foreign Affairs, the Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence, the Committee on Appropriations, and the Speaker and minority leader of the House of Representatives.1So in original. Probably should be followed by a comma.1

children.heading: Materially assisted
children.label: 3 Materially assisted
children.text: The term “materially assisted” means the provision of assistance that is significant and of a kind directly relevant to acts described in paragraph (1), (2), or (3) of or acts described in .section 8907(a) of this titlesection 8908(a)(1) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: a United States citizen or an alien lawfully admitted for permanent residence to the United States; or

children.label: B
children.text: an entity organized under the laws of the United States or of any jurisdiction within the United States, including a foreign branch of such an entity.
